creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-12-18 00:42:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/trac-datefield   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This plugin allows for validating custom fields as dates in tickets
  and adds fancy date selector to these fields.
  
  WWW: http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/DateFieldPlugin
  
  PR:             ports/141702
  Submitted by:   Eygene Ryabinkin <rea-fbsd at codelabs.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2496    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/www/trac-datefield/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/trac-datefield/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/trac-datefield/pkg-descr (new)
